Sent: Friday, May 1, 2026 2:04 PM
To: Piyush Sharma <piyush.sharma@vixxo.com>; Chris Ferri <Chris.Ferri@vixxo.com>
Cc: Gary Riemer <griemer@jfpetrogroup.com>
Subject: JFPG Service Rate Update

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of Vixxo. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Chris & Piyush,
Hope all is well. I believe this email may have launched from my outlook prematurely and unfinished.  If so I apologize.

As previously communicated, in this inflationary environment there is a need to review rates annually.
Attached is a 2026 price sheet  We’d appreciate your cooperation getting this incorporated into our MSA as soon as possible.
A couple key points

  *   The labor rate increase is in line with inflation since last rate change
  *   We’ve transitioned to a flat trip charge to streamline billing, administration, and avoid unnecessary rejections
  *   We’ve instituted a fuel surcharge in light of recent fuel price volatility

We understand rate increases are never welcome, but these adjustments are necessary to maintain our service standards. We look forward to finalizing this update with you expeditiously.




​
​
​
​​​​

Hi Melissa,

I hope all is well. I'm the general manager at Bend Heating & Sheet Metal in Bend, Oregon. I'm soon to be the owner.

We had the opportunity to repair some HVAC units at Verizon in October. We haven't received another service call for these locations. I was curious on a few things as we would be happy to work further with Vixxo and service more systems in Central Oregon and beyond if you're in need of a reliable HVAC contractor.


  1.  Who's the right person to discuss future partnerships?
  2.  Do the Verizon locations need quarterly maintenance as we service hundreds of commercial buildings across Central Oregon that have quarterly maintenances.
  3.  Are there any other accounts you would like a quote on regarding maintenance?
  4.  Is Vixxo in need of streamlining HVAC services with a contractor like us that serves other major contracts across Oregon?
At the end of the day, we have a great team at Bend Heating and would appreciate the opportunity to earn more business and grow a partnership with a company like Vixxo.

Looking forward to hearing back from you!

Thanks,
Ryan

records.Subject: KS - MRehling22 - Rate Negotiation
records.Description:
Hello folks,

This is vendor MRehling22 and I've been having a couple minor issues with
the Invoice generating feature on Vixxolink that hopefully you can help me
with.

1. The time on site is not set to a default of 1 hour minimum per visit.
This was the status quo for invoicing previously and while there is
"contest" function this does create delays as the invoice is then slated
for review.

2. If there is a situation that requires specialized parts to be sent, and
as a result, the job is not complete, but the ticket for that request is
closed; the Vixxolink does not acknowledge that ticket is closed, and will
not let me submit an invoice.

Thanks in advance for your help. Very much appreciated.

Mark Rehling (MRehling22)

records.Subject: Wade Plumbing Solutions - TN/GA - Plumbing
records.Description:
Hey Folks

                I have a provider that I use in TN for Circle K that is looking to take on more work.  With Circle K’s TN calls dwindling, especially in the south-eastern corridor of the state, this vendor has been struggling to ensure they have enough work to prevent laying off staff.  I've worked with Wade since they came onboard with Circle K, and I’ve always been very happy with their work.  They tend to do things right the first time, and while they’re SLA’s over the last year over all clients are middling, I’d still consider them a solid provider.  I know right now they do a bit of work in GA for other clients than CK, but they’re wondering if there is any option to take on more work.  They’ve averaging 1 call every 3 days with current volume.

I’ve attached their county checklist showing where they have service in both TN and GA.

Let me know if you see any place where they might be useful, thanks!

Brandon Covington
Facilities Lead | Vixxo Facility Solutions

Direct:   844-468.4996 ext. 72055
Mobile:  310-850-4329

records.Subject: KS - Bend Heating & Sheet Metal Inc. - OR - Heating Ventilation AC
records.Description:
Hi Vixxo,

I hope all is well. I'm the general manager at Bend Heating & Sheet Metal in Bend, Oregon. I'm soon to be the owner.

We had the opportunity to repair some HVAC units at Verizon in October. We haven't received another service call for these locations. I was curious on a few things as we would be happy to work further with Vixxo and service more systems in Central Oregon and beyond if you're in need of a reliable HVAC contractor.


  1.  Who's the right person to discuss future partnerships?
  2.  Do the Verizon locations need quarterly maintenance as we service hundreds of commercial buildings across Central Oregon that have quarterly maintenances.
  3.  Are there any other accounts you would like a quote on regarding maintenance?
  4.  Is Vixxo in need of streamlining HVAC services with a contractor like us that serves other major contracts across Oregon?

At the end of the day, we have a great team at Bend Heating and would appreciate the opportunity to earn more business and grow a partnership with a company like Vixxo.

Looking forward to hearing back from you!

Thanks,
Ryan


Ryan Zettle

General Manager

Phone: 541-382-1231

Email: ryan@bendheating.com

Website: bendheating.com

Address: 61540 American Ln, Bend, OR 97702

Subject: Need to Update our Profile & Trades we Service

Good Afternoon Chris,

A client had advised us we only have lock services listed as trades we service and need to update to include everything we cover. I created a ticket but had not heard back regarding this, so I called and was advised to email you to request our profile be updated with all the trades we service.

Can you please assist with updating our vendor profile? Please see below list of all trades we service as well as the few we do not service.

Our trades serviced include:
Drain cleaning, Handyman, Plumbing, Painting, Minor Electrical, Doors (hollow metal, fire doors, and wooden doors), Ceiling tiles, Trash removal/Pallet pick-ups, Power Washing, minor flooring repairs, and many others.

Note, we DO NOT do any HVAC or any work with gas.

Please confirm you received this email and also please advise/confirm that our profile has been updated to include the above trades.

Thank you,
Heather

Go Painting - 00000 - Painting
records.Description:
This came in from Jo Whittington reported via email 
14 days ago (Fri, 8 May 2026 at 1:37 PM)
 
To:KSOnboarding <ksonboarding@vixxo.com>Cc:stephanie.lange@vixxo.com
Good morning Vixxo Team,
TGIF! I hope you’ve had a great week.
Stephanie was kind enough to connect us last week, and I am ready to hit the ground running. I’ve loved working with the Construction division over at Vixxo in the past, and I’m excited to bring that same energy to our new partnership here at Go Painting.
When you have a moment, please send over the "to-do list" for onboarding so I can get us officially into the mix!
Have a wonderful weekend!
Best,
Jo

Jo Whittington
National Account Manager


c. 623-272-2525
e. Jo@gopainting.com

Updated info as of 5/28: 

Main phone #: 623.272.2525

Physical Address: 1791 E. Queen Creek Rd. Ste 2, Chandler AZ 85286

Lines of Service (LOS): Division 9, Finishes (painting)

Any licenses or certifications held: We are GC licensed in Arizona, Utah and Nevada our 3 HQ/home states. In addition, we are licensed to paint in the following states: Colorado, Washington D.C. (DMV metro), Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Massachusetts, Nebraska, North Carolina, Oregon, South Carolina, Tennessee, and Texas.

Service area(s) that you cover:  For project work ($10K or more), we can cover the full state(s) noted above. For reactive work orders, we'd prefer to keep it within a 50-mile radius of the zip code where we have our Go Painting crews locally. I've attached an Excel file with all of our zip codes. 

How many employees do you have? Approximately 200; we self-perform all our work using our Go Painting franchisees.

records.Subject: KS - Ferguson Glass, LLC - Rate Negotiation
records.Description:
We have taken a price increase MAY 1st 2026 and I am not seeing it in the system or hearing back from anyone.  

 I need our rates changed immediately.  The change was implemented 5/1/26 but none of the teams we work with are aware of this increase.   Please see pricing changes below for now.  
So unfortunately, we are taking an increase in pricing. We have been with you guys for eight years at the same price so it’s about time. My Accountant is just hammering it into me that I have to do this. 

I will be increasing our trip charged by $25 so it will be $75 total
I will be increasing our hourly rate to $85 so it’ll be $160 total for the first hour and trip. 

Emergency rates will go up to $100 for the trip charge  and $125 for the hourly with a 2 person minimum  and holiday pay will be $200

I will need this response today or I will have to put any new workers on hold  until it is resolved. 

Obviously extended travel or after hours is to be addressed at the time of dispatch. 

Please let me know who is able to help me implement these rates?

records.Description:
Diane,

Thank you for the email. I’m going to hand you over to the team that can manage your request, sounds like we just need to change the trip rate in the new system. I clearly remember getting your trip updated.

Here’s the team that will work with you @spm-recruitment<mailto:spm-recruitment@vixxo.com>. Be patient, we’re working to catch up from the long weekend.

Thank you,

Shelby Hansard
Director, Procurement | Vixxo Facility Solutions

Direct: 316-721-3656 Ext 2279
Mobile: 316 210-5650
Shelby.hansard@vixxo.com<mailto:Shelby.hansard@vixxo.com>

From: Diane Miller <dmiller.koreconstrgrp@gmail.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 26, 2026 7:34 AM
To: Shelby Hansard <Shelby.Hansard@vixxo.com>
Subject: Rate Question

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of Vixxo. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Good Morning Shelby,

I found an email with you from last year regarding changing our emergency rate and wanted to see if you still work in the department with changing rates? I reached out to someone else with vixxolink because last year we changed our trip fee from $40 to $50 and have had no issues up until recently. In the vixxolink portal occasionally an invoice will be denied because it is still showing as $40 trip charge. Are you able to help with this or do you know who else I can reach out to to get this properly changed?

Thank you!

Subject: CORRECTION: ProSite Facilities & Paving Group - New Account Setup

Crystal,
I need to clarify a misunderstanding based on your email's subject line and opening. To be clear: ProSite Facilities & Paving Group is not the new name for Emerald.

Emerald was acquired by a different company entirely. ProSite Facilities & Paving Group is a completely separate and independent company with no relationship to Emerald or the company that acquired it.

We are very interested in becoming a new service provider for Vixxo Facility Solutions under the ProSite name and would like to proceed with the onboarding process you sent. We will review the packet and requirements carefully.

Apologies for any confusion my previous communication may have caused. Please let me know if you need anything further to set up ProSite as a distinct vendor.

From: KSOnboarding
Sent: Tuesday, April 15, 2025 11:42 AM
To: Michael Ager
Cc: Crystal Gagner; Joseph Young
Subject: Emerald Acquisition to ProSite Facilities & Paving Group - New Account Setup


Hi Mike,



Thanks for calling to let us know that Emerald Acquisition is now ProSite Facilities & Paving Group. We’ll need to setup the new account on our end.

Our company offers two service lines, each with distinct requirements. If you’re interested in supporting either our national projects or construction projects, please let us know so we can review any specific requirements with you. Otherwise, the attached onboarding packet will guide your company through the setup process to support over 250 clients in need of reactive or preventative maintenance services across the U.S. and Canada.

Please take the time to review the packet carefully, paying special attention to the checklist of required documents for onboarding. Receiving a complete set of these documents is essential for us to proceed and issue work to your company. We’ll review your submission and notify you if any additional items are needed.

For transparency, here are some key requirements from our terms and conditions:

  *   We do not permit the use of 1099 employees, temp labor, or subcontracting.
  *   All service providers must check in and out of job sites using the IVR information on the work order.
  *   Before-and-after photos of completed work must be submitted by all service providers.
  *   All required documents (invoice, sign-off sheet, photos, etc.) must be uploaded through our portal for payment.

     *   Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. CST, at 844-419-4734.

  *   Payments are made on net 45 terms, beginning when your compliant invoice is submitted via the portal.
  *   A 7% PNS fee will be deducted from each invoice (capped at $700).

     *   Please avoid adding fees to offset this deduction, as doing so will result in a double charge.

Are you tax exempt?
We maintain resale certifications in most states, and we've attached the relevant certificates for your region. If you have any questions regarding these tax exemptions, please reach out to Accounts Payable at QSIAP@vixxo.com<mailto:QSIAP@vixxo.com>.

Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. We look forward to working together!

Thank you,

Crystal Gagner

Procurement Coordinator | Vixxo Facility Solutions

Subject: VixxoLink Training

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of Vixxo. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Dear Sidney / Alexander,
                After review and careful consideration of your VixxoLink protocol requirements, the time and effort involved, your location equipment (one hydraulic elevator) we have decided to decline your request.
                However, as you currently have two open invoices for state required re-inspections on violations from  your last year’s annual elevator inspection (copies attached for your reference); which  we are required to do by NV state statues and you are required to make payment to us for these and another inspection provided; before we issue you any elevator operating permits because the state does not consider a permit valid until all fees and services are paid in full, we must request immediate payment for these invoice at this time.
                Under the circumstances, I suggest that perhaps you can do as other clients have and make payment for our services as a one-time vendor since we only provide services once a year or out of a petty case account.  Either way, once we receive your payment for the attached invoices, we will then forward you your 2025 elevator operating permit.
I am sorry, but I also must advise you that if we do not receive payment by July 31st, 2026, we will have no choice but to file your units as non-payment with the state of Nevada. This may very well result in the following fines being levied against your elevator as the state does not consider any permit valid until all fees and services are paid in full to the AIA provider.
For your reference here is the list of the State of Nevada fines per offence for outdated permits; please note these are PER UNIT - not per property; fines can be assessed stating the day after the last permit expires at the discretion of the state:
                > 1st offense $500.00 to$ 5,000.00 – this can be assessed the day after the permit expires.
                > 2nd offense $1000.00 to $10,000.00 – this is assessed if the permit is still delinquent after 30 days from 1st offense.
                > 3rd offense $2500.00 to $25,000.00 – this is assessed if the permit is still delinquent after 30 days from 2nd offense.
                > 4th offense $5000.00 to $50,000.00 – this is assessed if the permit is still delinquent after 30 days from 3rd offense
Please feel free to contact the state should you have any questions regarding their fines or fine procedures.  Once a unit is reported for non-payment the state will then contact you to insist that you make payment to us for service and fees rendered and to them for all penalties they apply for expired permits.   We absolutely prefer NOT to have to go this route, so I implore you to please see that payment is made before the above date.  Your assistance in is greatly appreciated.
We would of course be happy to continue providing your future inspections if you can make other payment arrangements.  In the meantime, please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions or need any additional document copies.

Sincerely,
Elaine Smalley
CSR / West Coast Regional Manager

Dear Service Provider,
  Our records indicate that the clients you support have successfully transitioned to the new VixxoLink platform; however, we have not yet received confirmation that your required training has been completed. We’ve been reaching out for several months and urge you to complete this training or contact us with questions. This training is essential to ensure your team is aligned with updated work order, invoicing, and compliance procedures.

As part of the system upgrade, all service providers must now use one of the approved, compliant methods to check in and check out for every service request dispatched through VixxoLink. These methods support accuracy, transparency, and timely processing.

Approved Check-In/Check-Out Methods

  *   Mobile app (VixxoLink)
  *   IVR: 888‑928‑3276
  *   SMS check-in: Text 877‑806‑8014
Important: Calling the service center or operational team to check in or out is not a compliant method.
Approved Invoicing Method

  *   Invoices MUST be built within the VixxoLink web (back-office) platform. They cannot be uploaded as an attachment or sent via email.
Training Required:
To help you prepare to use the mobile app and submit invoices in the new system, we offer two training options. Please choose the option that best fits your needs.

Option 1: Self‑Paced Training
Review the attached training sign‑off sheet and return the completed form once all materials have been reviewed.

Option 2: Live Training Sessions
Register for your preferred dates using the provided session links. Each company must attend:

  *   One Back Office Session
  *   One Technician Session
How to Register:

  1.  Review the list of available session dates.
  2.  Select the hyperlink for your preferred date and time.
  3.  Complete the registration form in your browser.
  4.  A confirmation email will be sent once your registration is submitted.
Attendance will be verified, and your company’s training status will be updated once both required sessions are completed.

VixxoLink Back-office & Invoicing (30mins)
Mobile App Training (20 mins)

Hello,

I hope you're doing well.

I wanted to reach out because our mutual client, Otis, recently contacted me regarding the possibility of your organization onboarding with Vixxo as one of our service providers. Based on their recommendation and the quality of service you provide, I believe this could be a valuable partnership opportunity for both organizations.

Vixxo is a leading facilities management company that supports more than 400 clients across a wide range of industries throughout North America. Our provider network plays a critical role in delivering consistent, high-quality service to our customers, and we are always looking to partner with reliable, professional service organizations.

As part of our standard program, Vixxo applies a 7% Provider Network Service (PNS) fee per completed work order. In return, providers gain access to a steady flow of service opportunities, streamlined work order management, dedicated support, and the ability to service a broad portfolio of nationally recognized brands through a single platform.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss the onboarding process, answer any questions you may have, and explore how we can work together to support Otis and our broader client base.

Please let me know if you would be interested in learning more, and I would be happy to schedule a conversation at your convenience.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Thank you,

Heather Lanam

Hi,
We completed the onboarding process for North Carolina and South Carolina a few months ago, but haven't seen any work come through yet.
The reason I'm reaching out is that one of my contacts at VIXXO recently mentioned that there are quite a few clients in the Charlotte area and was surprised when I told her we had been told there wasn't much work available down here.
